phase_name: Topic cache — train Nami's technical knowledge into local weights

last_result.hypothesis: HYP6: re-baseline run on HYP4 corpus to verify reproducibility + restore working model_weights.json after HYP5 trashed it. No code or data changes.
last_result.verdict: REVERT — but reveals a CRITICAL process-hygiene bug, not a model bug
last_result.reason: Should have reproduced HYP4 (bpb 0.1602 / persona 5/5) but landed near HYP5 (bpb 0.2179 / persona 3/5). Root cause discovered post-run: orphan bun process PID 92506 (server.ts, PPID=1, 34h elapsed, 99.4% CPU continuous since Apr 29 23:21 cleanup) was contending for 1 full CPU core. nami-lm training slowed ~50%: HYP4 ran ~92s/ep (30 epochs in 2772s), HYP5/HYP6 ran ~135s/ep (only 20 epochs in 2700s). Killed 92506 via SIGKILL at 2026-04-30 10:30. **HYP5's failure diagnosis was therefore WRONG** — the +1.6% corpus growth was NOT the actual cause; the orphan bun was. Need a clean re-run (HYP7) to confirm baseline stability post-kill.
